biography: Caleb Landry Jones (born, December 7, 1989) is an American actor and musician. He is known for his roles as Banshee in X-Men: First Class (2011), Jeremy Armitage in Get Out (2017), Red Welby in Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri (2017), Ty Carter in The Outpost (2019), Jeff in Finch (2021), and Martin Bryant in Nitram (2021).
name: Caleb Landry Jones
